# services.dex

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.dex`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.dex.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the OpenID Connect and OAuth2 identity provider. |
| `services.dex.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | Environment file (see {manpage}`systemd.exec(5)` "EnvironmentFile=" section for the syntax) to define variables for dex. This option can be used to safely include secret keys into the dex configuration. |
| `services.dex.package` | `package` | The dex-oidc package to use. |
| `services.dex.settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | The available options can be found in [the example configuration](https://github.com/dexidp/dex/blob/v2.45.1/config.yaml.dist). It's also possible to refer to environment variables (defined in [services.dex.environmentFile](#opt-services.dex.environmentFile)) using the syntax `$VARIABLE_NAME`. |
